title: Málaga, Andalusia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Málaga, Andalusia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Málaga is a city in Andalusia with a population of 578,000. The birthplace of Picasso on the Costa del Sol, with a vibrant port, Alcazaba fortress, and year-round Mediterranean sunshine.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
